task.title: Download NLTK language data
task.shortdesc: Download the NLTK language corpora required by validation rules that check sentence counts or part-of-speech tags. You only need to do this once per Python environment.

othermeta.name: description
othermeta.content: Download the NLTK language data required by sentence-count and part-of-speech validation rules. Needed once per environment.

prereq.p: markdown-validator must be installed. See Install markdown-validator.

context.p: Rules that check sentence counts or part-of-speech tags require NLTK language data. Without it, those rules fail with LookupError: Resource punkt_tab not found. If your rule set does not use s or p<N> rules, skip this task.

step.cmd: Activate the virtual environment where markdown-validator is installed.

ul.li: punkt_tab — sentence tokenizer used for sentence-count rules
averaged_perceptron_tagger_eng — part-of-speech tagger used for POS rules

step.stepresult: NLTK downloads the files to your NLTK data directory (typically ~/nltk_data on macOS and Linux, or %APPDATA%\nltk_data on Windows).
The terminal prints OK. If it prints a LookupError instead, the download did not complete. Run the download command again.

postreq.p: Ready to validate: Validate a single file. If you still see a LookupError, see Resolve an NLTK LookupError.
